rewritten_requirements: The system shall wait for a new sale.
The system shall enter items one by one as they are selected by the customer.
The system shall move to payment after all items have been added.
The system shall complete the sale immediately if the customer pays with cash.
The system shall verify the payment if the customer chooses to pay by card or check.
The system shall complete the sale once the payment is approved.
The system shall return to waiting for the next customer after the payment has been finished.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system waits for a new sale.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The system starts by waiting for a new sale.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Items are entered one by one as the customer selects them.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Once a sale begins, items are entered one by one as the customer selects them.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After all items are added, the system moves to payment.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After all items are added, the system moves to payment.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If the customer pays with cash, the sale is completed immediately.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the customer pays with cash, the sale is completed immediately.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If the customer chooses to pay by card or check, the system first verifies the payment.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the customer chooses to pay by card or check, the system first verifies the payment.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Once the payment is approved, the sale is completed.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Once it is approved, the sale is completed.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After finishing the payment, the system returns to waiting for the next customer.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After finishing the payment, the system returns to waiting for the next customer.
